binary_metadata.file_type: a sh script, ASCII text executable

apt_metadata.description:
Oracle assessment framework
Oscanner is an Oracle assessment framework developed in Java.
It has a plugin-based architecture and comes with a couple
of plugins that currently do:
.
- Sid Enumeration
- Passwords tests (common & dictionary)
- Enumerate Oracle version
- Enumerate account roles
- Enumerate account privileges
- Enumerate account hashes
- Enumerate audit information
- Enumerate password policies
- Enumerate database links
.
The results are given in a graphical java tree.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use oscanner because ### oscanner.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair oscanner with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `oscanner --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ### oscanner.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install oscanner
Install with: sudo apt install oscanner
